zh.Low Torry, Fife, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭費伏勒夫 托利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Wardlaw於1365年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾維爾頓時，他的父親Henry Wardlaw37歲，母親Margaret de Halkett42歲。他於1388年與Christian de Valognes在英國蘇格蘭費伏勒夫 托利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1433年在英國蘇格蘭費伏勒夫 托利享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wardlaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from Wardlaw, in Kirkhill, Inverness, which is recorded as Wardelaue in 1202, or perhaps Wardlaw in Ayrs. However, the possibility that the Scottish family is related to the Wardlow family of Wardlow (Derbys) cannot be ruled out. The placenames derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Wardlow
meanings: English: habitational name from Wardlow in Derbyshire, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw .

variants.name: Warden
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Anglo-Norman French wardein, Old French gardein ‘one who keeps guard, a warden’, i.e. a gate-keeper, porter, or sentinel.

English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Bedfordshire, County Durham, Kent, Northumerland, and Northamptonshire, called Warden, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + dūn ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw and Wardle 2.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Wardlaw was born in 1365, in Wilton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Wardlaw, was 37 and his mother, Margaret de Halkett, was 42. He married Christian de Valognes in 1388, in Low Torry, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died in 1433, in Low Torry, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Wardlaw(이)가 1365년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Wardlaw(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Halkett(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1388년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 로 토리에서 Christian de Valognes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1433년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 로 토리에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.
